logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "env": Mule::p('mule.env'), "transactionId": vars.correlationId, "applicationName": app.name , "flowName": flow.name ++ ": Start" , "timestamp": now() as DateTime , "message": "Health Check Flow Started" }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json encoding="UTF-8" --- { "apiName": app.name, "status" : "Success", "timeStamp": now() as DateTime }

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "env": Mule::p('mule.env'), "transactionId": vars.correlationId, "applicationName": app.name , "flowName": flow.name ++ ": End" , "timestamp": now() as DateTime , "message": "Health Check Flow Ended" }]
